# eolas

> Read-only HTTP API serving cleaned, versioned New Zealand and OECD public data
> (~1,500 datasets) as JSON, CSV, Arrow, or Parquet. One schema, one auth scheme,
> and one date format across every publishing agency.

Base URL `https://api.eolas.fyi`; data routes under `/v1`; auth via an
`X-API-Key: vs_...` header. Official clients: `eolas-data` (Python, PyPI) and
`eolas` (R). Both honour the `EOLAS_BASE_URL` environment variable.

## Start here

- [For coding agents](https://docs.eolas.fyi/AGENTS.md): endpoints, query
  parameters, tier caps, the HTTP 413 large-dataset guard, provenance headers, and
  the mistakes that cost a retry. Read this first.
- [Getting started](https://docs.eolas.fyi/quickstart/): install and first query
- [Authentication](https://docs.eolas.fyi/authentication/): API keys and headers

## Reference

- [Python client](https://docs.eolas.fyi/python/reference/)
- [R client](https://docs.eolas.fyi/r/reference/)
- [CLI](https://docs.eolas.fyi/cli/)
- [Bulk downloads](https://docs.eolas.fyi/bulk-downloads/): whole-dataset files (Pro/Enterprise)
- [Snowflake share](https://docs.eolas.fyi/snowflake/): zero-copy Iceberg share
- [Data sources](https://docs.eolas.fyi/sources/): per-agency coverage and licensing

## Optional

- [Examples](https://docs.eolas.fyi/examples/)
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.eolas.fyi/troubleshooting/)
- [Enterprise SLA](https://docs.eolas.fyi/sla/)
